string.text:
CAA Micro Roni OC33 Gen 3 is a carbine conversion kit originally designed for standard Glock pistols, but in this case, it houses an OC-33 "Pernach". The Micro-RONI is designed to provide improved grip, stability, and a platform for various accessories. Use this kit to extend your shooting range, speed up aiming, and increase accuracy. 
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] No compatible suppressor
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] NATO optical and reflex sights
